3129020.name: Kingdom Savannah
3129020.description:
Awaken the Savannah! Years ago humans drove the animals away. Will you bring life to

its stunning plains again?

Coax mighty creatures back to their home, learn from the wise ranger, build your cabin, and

embark on magical handpan missions as you play through the levels and explore

this open world. You might even unearth the legend of the atlas bear!

Use your equipment and tools to photograph, collect items and find hidden sheet music for the handpan and lure legendary animals. Take control of the unique and cosy base building system whilst building sanctuaries for animals unlocked through completing various tasks and missions.
3129020.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
